data.content: Implemented console-log-tap: wired installConsoleTap() into instrumentation.ts register() to intercept console.log/warn/error at startup, teeing output to {logRoot}/_server/YYYY-MM-DD/console.log. Also captures uncaughtException and unhandledRejection. Added 4 unit tests for the tap module and updated instrumentation test with mock. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests). Pushed to main as 3bb5eac688b2.
